name: ui-compare-playwright
description: Automated UI comparison between two environments

scripts.test:homepage: rm -rf test-results && npx playwright test tests/home/homepage-compare.spec.ts --project=chrome --reporter=line
scripts.test:about-us: rm -rf test-results && npx playwright test tests/company/about-us-compare.spec.ts --project=chrome --reporter=line
scripts.test:contact-us: rm -rf test-results && npx playwright test tests/company/contact-us-compare.spec.ts --project=chrome --reporter=line
scripts.test:use-cases: rm -rf test-results && npx playwright test tests/use-cases/use-cases-compare.spec.ts --project=chrome
scripts.test:blog: rm -rf test-results && npx playwright test tests/resources/blog-compare.spec.ts --project=chrome --reporter=line
scripts.test:blog-tag: rm -rf test-results && npx playwright test tests/resources/blog-tag-compare.spec.ts --project=chrome --reporter=line
scripts.test-homepage: npm run test:homepage && npm run open-homepage
scripts.test-about-us: npm run test:about-us && npm run open-about-us
scripts.test-meet-the-team: npm run test:meet-the-team && npm run open-meet-the-team
scripts.test-contact-us: npm run test:contact-us && npm run open-contact-us
scripts.test-use-cases: npm run test:use-cases && npm run open-use-cases
scripts.test-account-strategy: npm run test:account-strategy && npm run open-account-strategy
scripts.test-opportunity-strategy: npm run test:opportunity-strategy && npm run open-opportunity-strategy
scripts.test-value-assessments: npm run test:value-assessments && npm run open-value-assessments
scripts.test-value-coach: npm run test:value-coach && npm run open-value-coach
scripts.test-value-of-val: npm run test:value-of-val && npm run open-value-of-val
scripts.test-blog: npm run test:blog && npm run open-blog
scripts.test-individual-blog: npm run test:individual-blog && npm run open-individual-blog
scripts.test-blog-tag: npm run test:blog-tag && npm run open-blog-tag
scripts.test-blog-category: npm run test:blog-category && npm run open-blog-category
